legacy.full_text: Are there any NFT projects out there that provide a passive income like @Titans_33 does? I am genuinely curious as I would like to invest in them because at this point, why buy an NFT hoping number goes up vs. a project that provides tangible returns and number goes up?
Great feedback everyone, thank you. For clarity, it's hard to stay on top of all of the projects out there, so this is why I asked, for me, as well as anyone else in the same boat. Have a great day!

result.text:
Yes, @StagAlliance makes income from multiple sources (fantasy books) and it flows back to holders. This season has 33k $ADA and will increase. Last season was 38k $ADA.

Tiny supply, low floor, the dynamics are quite good.

The incredible thing about this is also that the potential is unlimited - the total addressable market for fantasy books is huge and fantasy books are popular for generations. The community can help directly increase the income by spreading the word about the books. The books are bestselling already.

There is nothing like it in crypto currently.
